pipeline_mode.reasoning: No CLI flags or project config overrides. Adaptive mode allows phases to be skipped or reordered based on research findings.

enabled.reasoning: JIT not configured. All phases run sequentially.

skip_phases.reasoning: High ambiguity (4/5) requires all phases including research and brainstorm.

approval_gates.reasoning: Gates after brainstorm (phase 3), spec (phase 4), and plan (phase 6). Research (phase 1) flows directly into brainstorm. TDD (phase 5) flows directly into plan.

task_type.reasoning: Adding new capability (design awareness) to existing scaffold pipeline. Not a bug fix or refactor.

complexity.reasoning: Touches 3-5 agent definitions + 1 skill + tests + docs. Design decisions affect plugin architecture. No runtime code.

ambiguity.reasoning: 5 viable approaches, no clear winner before research. High ambiguity requires full research -> brainstorm -> spec pipeline.

confidence.reasoning: Cannot commit to an approach before research phase determines which option(s) to pursue.

version_impact.reasoning: New optional feature (design awareness). No new required config keys. New optional agent or agent extensions are backward-compatible. Per versioning policy: new backward-compatible feature = MINOR.

affected_files.reasoning: Core agent and skill files that need design awareness. Exact list may change based on brainstorm outcome (e.g., new agent file if Option 1 chosen).
